title: Hold Easy Place
description: A Litematica addon, to Hold easy place
body:
HoldEasyPlace is an addon mod for Litematica, designed to keep the Easy Place mode continuously enabled without needing to hold down the easyPlaceUse key (freeing the right mouse button).
  
  
HoldEasyPlace 是一個專為 Litematica 設計的附加模組，旨在幫助玩家保持簡單放置模式一直開啟，不用一直按住easyPlaceUse按鍵(解放右鍵)。

## **If you're using versions 1.21 and above but the options aren't appearing, please update [MaLiLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/malilib) and [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica) from [modrinth](https://modrinth.com).**
